title: Crispy Fish Tacos
description: A flavorful Mexican dish featuring crispy battered fish, fresh slaw, and a squeeze of lime.

ingredients.name: Fish fillets
ingredients.notes: white fish such as cod or tilapia

instructions: 1. Cut fish fillets into small pieces and season with salt and black pepper.
2. In a bowl, mix together flour and a pinch of salt.
3. Dredge fish pieces in flour mixture, shaking off excess.
4. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
5. Fry fish pieces until golden brown and crispy, about 3-4 minutes.
6. Transfer fried fish to a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
7. Warm tacos shells according to package instructions.
8. Assemble tacos by placing fried fish into shells, topping with fresh slaw and a squeeze of lime juice.
